name: Nitte Meenakshi Institute of Technology

onlineSources.finding: Excel sheet containing 143 company offers across all branches with exact LPA figures.
onlineSources.name: Official 2024 Placement Record

reports.author: Placement Cell Data
reports.comment: Official data obtained showing 143 companies visited. Top recruiters include Toyota Connected and Nvidia at 26 LPA, and Walmart at 24 LPA. Strong presence of Japanese companies like Hitachi and Anest Iwata offering 20+ LPA packages.

warningDetails: Internship data is also included in the calculations.

onlineSources.name: Official 2024 Placement Record
onlineSources.finding: PDF document containing 88 company records with exact LPA figures and total students placed per company.

reports.author: Placement Cell Data
reports.comment: Official 2024 placement record showing 508 total placements. Microsoft and Google offered the highest at 58 LPA and 57 LPA respectively. Several top tier packages like Intuit (45 LPA) and Cisco (42 LPA) are off-campus. Major volume recruiters include Fidelity (21 placed at 12 LPA) and L&T (16 placed at 6.8 LPA).

name: International Institute of Information Technology Hyderabad

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: The overall highest package recorded during DTU placements 2025 was INR 85 LPA. DTU provides on-campus, off-campus, and internship opportunities to all its students through its placement cell. The placement percentage at DTU is above 70-80 percent for most courses.

name: National Institute of Technology Karnataka Surathkal

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: A total of 1246 students were placed out of 1611 eligible students during NIT Surathkal placement 2025. The highest and average package offered was INR 63.3 LPA and 15.08 LPA.

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: During Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur placement in 2025, out of 1109 offers, 1035 were accepted. During IIT Kanpur placements 2024 the total number of international offers were 989. The highest and average package offered at IIT Kanpur were INR 1.9 CPA and INR 26.27 LPA respectively.

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: In the 2025 recruitment cycle, over 1,091 students from IIT Madras were placed with a placement rate of approximately 80% for B.Tech. The average package offered was an impressive 22 LPA, with a median salary of 19.60 LPA. The highest package reached INR 4.3 crore per annum, awarded by Jane Street.

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: 1811 placement offers have been received from Core, IT, Finance, Analytics, consultancy, IT, and software sectors. INR 2.14 CPA is the highest package received. The average package for B.Tech stood at 24 LPA, with a median of 19.76 LPA.

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: The highest international package was an impressive INR 2.05 Crores, offered by Databricks. The average package across all programs was approximately INR 18.34 LPA. The CSE branch saw an average package of 34.07 LPA.

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: NIT Warangal recorded placement rate of 79.3% in 2025. The highest package offered during NIT Warangal placements 2025 was INR 64.3 LPA. The average and median package offered was INR 14.35 LPA and INR 12 LPA, respectively.

name: Motilal Nehru National Institute of Technology Allahabad
Jadavpur University
warningDetails: Average package reflects overall BTech including multiple core and non-core branches.

name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: The highest and average package offered during SRM Institute of Science and Technology placements 2025 stood at INR 65 LPA and INR 6.68 LPA, respectively. The total number of offers stood at 9740, which included 4227 high paying offers.

warningDetails: Placement percentage relies heavily on service-based mass recruiters.

name: Lovely Professional University

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: The highest international package reached INR 3 Crore per annum, while the highest domestic package stood at INR 2.5 Crore. The average package for the top 25% of placed students was INR 10.23 LPA. However, with a massive batch size, the overall median is substantially lower.

warningDetails: Highly advertised top packages are often international off-campus outliers. The overall average and median are much lower due to the massive batch size.

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: The highest package offered at Amity University Noida Placements 2025 for B.Tech stood at INR 35.9 LPA. The average package stood at INR 9.6 LPA in 2025, and the median package was INR 6 LPA. Over 110 companies visited the campus.

name: Galgotias University

reports.author: Aggregated Data
reports.comment: For the 2024 placements, the highest BTech salary package offered was INR 39 LPA. The official data states that INR 5.40 LPA was the average package provided to the passing-out cohort overall.

warningDetails: Placement percentage and averages are diluted due to a very high student intake and reliance on low-paying service sector mass recruiters.

name: Chandigarh University
warningDetails: Like other massive private universities, CU relies heavily on marketing highly inflated outlier packages, while the median remains standard for service-based IT roles.

name: Indian Institute of Information Technology Allahabad
Manipal Institute of Technology
warningDetails: Batch size is quite large; median package represents the bulk of placements.

name: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology
VIT Bhopal University
warningDetails: Placements are centralized with the main VIT Vellore campus. High packages are mostly outliers from the combined pool, and the median for this specific campus leans heavily toward mass recruitment.

name: PES University
warningDetails: Batch size has significantly increased recently. Placements are highly competitive internally.

name: Chitkara University
warningDetails: High reliance on IT service companies offering standard 3.5 to 4.5 LPA packages. High marketing inflation.

name: Haldia Institute of Technology
warningDetails: Placements are highly dependent on bulk hiring by TCS, Cognizant, and Wipro at base packages.

name: Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology
warningDetails: The highest package is often off-campus or international. The vast majority of placements are in service-based IT companies.

name: International Institute of Information Technology Bangalore
Indraprastha Institute of Information Technology Delhi
Dhirubhai Ambani Institute of Information and Communication Technology
Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology
